overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk industrial complex. The player exits a canvas tent and navigates through neon-lit alleys, narrow red-lit corridors with pipes, and ascends to an upper level with NPCs. The environment features heavy industrial machinery, neon signage, and dramatic lighting transitions.

turns left slightly to follow path between industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a canvas tent looking out into a vast industrial plaza. The player exits the tent and walks forward between massive industrial pillars and machinery. Several NPCs stand on an elevated metal platform to the left, observing the area. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

enters narrow alleyway with dark red walls and graffiti

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading FRANKIE'S GARAGE with arrow pointing right
stacked industrial containers and barrels
wall with spray paint markings and industrial piping
large wall sign with STRAY HEROES text in stylized font

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrower alleyway dominated by a bright pink neon sign for FRANKIE'S GARAGE. The environment shifts to a more enclosed space with metal crates and graffiti-covered walls. As the player continues, they enter a darker narrow passage with the STRAY HEROES sign visible on the wall ahead.

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a tight corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. Large green industrial pipes run along the left wall with visible valves and junctions. The space is claustrophobic with metal grating floors and graffiti visible on the right wall. The atmosphere is tense and industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial stairwell transitioning to upper platform

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger space with visible sky and industrial tanks
begins ascending metal staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing a metal staircase to reach an upper industrial platform

entered.detail: metal grated stairs with yellow railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The player exits the narrow red-lit corridor into a more open industrial area with a large pressure tank visible ahead. The environment brightens as the player approaches and begins ascending a metal staircase with yellow railings. The sky becomes visible through gaps in the industrial structures above.

encounters group of NPCs standing and conversing on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an upper level walkway bathed in bright sunlight streaming through the industrial structures. Several NPCs stand conversing near a chain-link fence on the right. The environment shifts from dark industrial interiors to a brighter, more open platform area with concrete pillars and metal scaffolding.

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a corridor dominated by green neon lighting and large ventilation pipes overhead. The area features metal grating floors and industrial machinery on the sides. A distant red neon sign reading ROOSEVELT becomes visible at the end of the corridor, and a lone figure stands against the wall in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a dim industrial plaza through claustrophobic neon corridors and finally into a bright, elevated walkway. It begins by exiting a canvas tent into a moody plaza filled with massive pillars and observing NPCs on a metal platform, before turning right into a narrow alleyway dominated by a bright pink neon sign for Frankie's Garage. The camera then pushes deeper into a tense, red-lit corridor lined with green industrial pipes and metal grating, which eventually opens up toward a large pressure tank and a yellow-railed staircase. As the player ascends, the scene shifts from dark interiors to a sun-drenched upper platform where NPCs gather by a chain-link fence, before finally moving into a green-lit corridor with overhead ventilation pipes leading toward a distant red Roosevelt sign.
